content: We can frame Self-Refine's iterative unsupervised refinement pipeline as a 'skeleton' to host multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid framework where each Self-Refine iteration pulls critical feedback from inconsistent solving perspectives instead of the LLM's default single self-evaluation. This framework retains Self-Refine's key advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or external data while mitigating the common flaw of single-perspective self-feedback where the LLM repeats its own initial blind spots.
